title: Japanese cast of 30 thrown into despair
display_title: Japanese cast of 30 thrown into despair
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Japanese cast of 3.0 thrown into despair?             Quote Post by Maru » Wed Feb 27, 2013 10:55 pm Over in this thread Kendrix mentioned "that the original cast [of 3.0] was partially thrown into despair." Does anybody have any more information on this? I tried searching for it here and elsewhere, but couldn't find anything. It seems like a bad sign if the people who have had these characters living in their heads for nearly twenty years now were left in despair by 3.0. Then again, it seems to be a pretty despair inducing movie to a number of people.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Feb 28, 2013 12:02 am If 3.0 was apparently so Gloom Inducing that it sent the cast into despair, it really begs the question what kind of movies they were watching before this one....

[]:             Quote Post by jimmiel » Thu Feb 28, 2013 12:04 am Actors are sensitive people. I remember hearing that the cast of Firefly was able to accurately portray grief at a character's death by not acting after they were informed their show had been cancelled. ... which seems a bit pathetic to me, but whatever.
